feed.title: RFC: Two years of BIP Editing, time for some new faces?

entry.title: RFC: Two years of BIP Editing, time for some new faces?
entry.summary: Jaroslav Dlouhy has expressed a desire to join the BIP Editors team to boost the number of contributors. He mentioned that he had previously offered his contributions to the same group two years earlier and is now seeking to understand the necessary steps for authorization. His communication indicates a proactive approach towards participation in the Bitcoin Development community, highlighting an ongoing commitment to contribute to this area. This engagement reflects the dynamic and collaborative nature of open-source projects where community involvement is crucial for continual development and enhancement. Jaroslav is awaiting further instructions on how to proceed with his offer to assist, demonstrating readiness to engage more deeply in the project's workflows and responsibilities.
